extensionDescription.message: Get categories of MediaWikis (e.g. Wikipedia, fandom.com) and find articles matching the categories by different criteria. Be aware: this AddOn performs background webrequests based on your input!

browserActionNoWiki.description: BroswerAction: alt-message when not on a MediaWiki page.

browserActionOpenPopupDetail.description: BroswerAction: open the Popup with a specific wiki.

browserActionAvailableCategories.description: BroswerAction: list title for current available categories.

popupNavOverview.description: Popup menu: navigation entry for overview.

popupNavShow.description: Popup menu: navigation entry for detailed wiki information.

popupLoading.description: Display loading while category data is fetched for the popup.

popupCategories.description: Popup display, number of categories saved for a Wiki.

popupDeleteAllText.message: This will delete all data from the extension. Are you sure?
popupDeleteAllText.description: Popup display, delete all confirmation text body.

popupPages.description: Popup display, number of pages saved for a Wiki.

popupMathResults.description: Popup display, results headline for math operations.

popupMathResultsNone.message: No results, please check your calculation.
popupMathResultsNone.description: Popup display, results headline for math operations with no results.

popupMathResultsCaseSensitive.description: Popup display, filter case sensitive y/n.

titleAND.message: An entry must be contained in both the left-hand list as well as in the category on the right.

titleOR.message: An entry can be contained either in the left-hand list or the category on the right, or both.

titleXOR.message: An entry must be contained either in the left-hand list or the category on the right, but not in both.

titleNAND.message: An entry can not be contained in both the left-hand list as well as in the category on the right.

titleNOR.message: An entry can not be contained on either side (result will be empty).

titleXNOR.message: An entry must be contained on both sides or neither.

infoDialogPopupUse.message: In the overview of your stored data you can select a wiki via the tab 'Overview'. The selected wiki is opened automatically if it isn't already open. Once a wiki is opened you can swap to it via the right tab of the wiki's name.
infoDialogPopupUse.description: Info: description of how to use the popup page.

infoDialogTruthTableUse.message: Below is the list of available operators and a truth table. Hover over the operators to see how entries in categories can be matched and filtered. Please note that non-existent entries can't appear even if the truth table says so.
infoDialogTruthTableUse.description: Info: description of how to use the truth table.

infoDialogTruthTableCategoryLeft.description: Info: truth table category on the left side.

infoDialogTruthTableCategoryRight.description: Info: truth table category on the right side.

optionsSectionSettings.description: Options: section title for settings section.

optionsSectionUpDown.description: Options: section title for up and down section.

optionsNotationLogicSymbol.description: Options: notation selection optio logic symbol.

optionsLabelSelectSyncUp.message: Select wikis to export and synchronize
optionsLabelSelectSyncUp.description: Options: label for wiki selection to store.

optionsSyncUpTitle.message: This will overwrite selected / all wikis in the synchronized storage!
optionsSyncUpTitle.description: Options: title warning for sync up.

optionsLabelSelectSyncDown.message: Select wikis to import from synchronized storage
optionsLabelSelectSyncDown.description: Options: label for wiki selection to load.

optionsSyncDownTitle.message: This will overwrite selected / all wikis in the local storage!
optionsSyncDownTitle.description: Options: title warning for sync down.

errorDialogTitle.description: Error: title of the dialog popup.

errorDialogOK.description: Error: accept-button text for the dialog popup.

errorCategoryAlreadySaved.description: Error: the requested category has been fetched already.

errorPopupCorruptedCategory.message: One or more categories of this wiki are corrupted. Please delete the wiki and save the categories again.
errorPopupCorruptedCategory.description: Error: a category is found to be corrupted.

errorWebReqFail.message: The requested webpage could not be loaded!
errorWebReqFail.description: Error: the requested web resource could not be loaded.

securityOffsiteCategory.description: Security warning: the category has a target outside of the current wiki.

securityOffsiteCategoryRedirect.description: Security warning: the category paging has a target outside of the current wiki.
